## prompt-7-final-bill

*Generated by Process A from `auto-bill-01/sub-prompts/prompt-7-final-bill.md`,
`cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill`, and the human corrections previously
made from draft-bill to full-bill, adapted for the single-prompt v5.0 build
(repository release v2.0.0).*

Produce the polished, final H. R. 9510 Bill v5.0 LaTeX and zip into
`auto-bill-02/final-bill`, so its context and formatting quality match and
exceed both `cancer-automated/.../VVUQ-05/final-bill` (Bill v3.0) and
`auto-bill-01/final-bill` (Bill v4.0). Start from `auto-bill-02/full-bill` and
apply the corrections a senior human author would make, learning from the
improvements visible across both prior draft-to-full-to-final cycles: tune the
reference (bibliography) appearance with correct white-space formatting so no
line ends with a single stranded word; balance every page with `\clearpage`,
`\vspace`, and `\hspace`; confirm every table column width uses
`>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{<width>}` (or the right-aligned `R{<width>}`
for dollar columns) at the body measure; verify single hyphens only and the
section symbol § for every codified reference; verify every fiscal-year series
sums correctly and every dollar figure is marked illustrative unless tied to a
cited statute or notice; and confirm the clickable, page-filling table of
contents lists all five operative sections and all five appendices (Rules 2,
3).

Carry the complete financial perspective in its improved, updated, final form:
the financial findings, the operative section 515D with its financial-data
record, the twelve-section comparative print, the SEC. 5 financial core
(transparency, user fees, authorization of appropriations, budgetary effects),
and the five financial appendices, with the three media balanced (full-width
tables, centered ASCII figures, gray-scale Mermaid TikZ figures) and each
medium used only where it is the correct representation. Include the
"Authorship, Notices, and Provenance" block and the References back matter,
both correct. No images; white background throughout.

One commit each for `main.tex`, `usctitle.sty`, `references.bib`, and
`README.md`; one commit per `sections/*.tex`. For the second-to-last commit,
fix all errors across all files. For the last commit, write the directory
README and the `final-bill-LaTeX.zip` Overleaf bundle. All commits belong to
stage milestone M8 of the single pull request, and this stage marks repository
release v2.0.0.

Create `auto-bill-02/final-bill/prompt-final-bill.md` (this prompt verbatim
under a `## prompt-final-bill` heading) and `output-final-bill.md` (the
narrative output). After this stage, perform the single last update (Rule 10,
milestone M9): add the v2.0.0 entries to `CHANGELOG.md` and `releases.md` at
the repository root and finalize the repository documentation (the root
`README.md` and the `auto-bill-02/README.md` build status). Do not stall, ask
questions, or go into plan mode. The LaTeX must compile in Overleaf with
pdfLaTeX.
